title: Unibos | Badminton Rackets Set Of 4 For Outdoor Backyard Games, Including 4 Rackets, 12 Nylon Shuttlecocks, 4 Replacement Grip Tapes & 1 Carrying Bag
features: ✅𝗣𝗔𝗖𝗞𝗔𝗚𝗘 𝗖𝗢𝗡𝗧𝗘𝗡𝗧𝗦 𝗪𝗜𝗧𝗛 𝗔𝗖𝗖𝗘𝗦𝗦𝗢𝗥𝗜𝗘𝗦 𝗜𝗡𝗖𝗟𝗨𝗗𝗘𝗗: Set features 4 steel badminton rackets, 12 nylon shuttlecocks, 4 grip tapes for comfort, & a large carrying bag for easy transport and storage.
✅𝗟𝗜𝗚𝗛𝗧𝗪𝗘𝗜𝗚𝗛𝗧 𝗗𝗘𝗦𝗜𝗚𝗡 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗨𝗔𝗟 𝗘𝗡𝗧𝗘𝗥𝗧𝗔𝗜𝗡𝗠𝗘𝗡𝗧: Pre-strung rackets are lightweight to reduce fatigue during play, making them ideal for family games, kids, or recreational players enjoying outdoor fun.

✅𝗦𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗗𝗬 𝗧𝗘𝗠𝗣𝗘𝗥𝗘𝗗 𝗦𝗧𝗘𝗘𝗟 𝗙𝗥𝗔𝗠𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗗𝗨𝗥𝗔𝗕𝗜𝗟𝗜𝗧𝗬: Each racket is crafted with a one-piece tempered steel frame & integrated T-joint to balance strength & lightness, providing reliable performance and longevity.
✅𝗖𝗢𝗠𝗙𝗢𝗥𝗧𝗔𝗕𝗟𝗘 𝗚𝗥𝗜𝗣 𝗪𝗜𝗧𝗛 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗧𝗜𝗩𝗘 𝗧𝗔𝗣𝗘𝗦: Includes PU grip tapes to ensure a secure hold and absorb sweat, along with protective tapes to prevent frame damage during active play.
✅𝗩𝗘𝗥𝗦𝗔𝗧𝗜𝗟𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗔𝗟𝗟 𝗦𝗞𝗜𝗟𝗟 𝗟𝗘𝗩𝗘𝗟𝗦 & 𝗟𝗢𝗖𝗔𝗧𝗜𝗢𝗡𝗦: Suitable for beginners & pros, this set is perfect for outdoor games at the beach, backyard, park, or garden, accommodating players of all ages.
description: Enjoy hours of fun with the Premium Badminton Rackets Set of 4, perfect for beginners & casual players alike. This complete set includes everything needed for a friendly match in the backyard, park, or garden, combining quality materials with comfortable design for effortless play.

specifications_table.Included components: ‎4 Rackets, 12 pc Nylon Shuttlecocks, 4 pc Replacement Overgrip , 4 pc Racket Protection Tapes & 1 Racket bag
